title: Charge case inside screen/forth screen, right zoom in/out
scenario: Tapping circle button on QSG charge case inside screen toggles zoom and text display
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
3. Locate and tap on the Quick Start Guide (QSG) option.
4. On the QSG screen, find the charge case inside view.
5. Tap the right circle button on the charge case inside screen.
6. Observe the zoomed-in view and any new text that appears.
7. Tap the same right circle button again.
expected: Tapping the right circle button zooms in and displays new text. Tapping the circle button again zooms out to the original charge case inside screen.
